verdict_reasoning: TGFB1 is a classical secreted cytokine with a signal peptide and no transmembrane domain or lipid anchor at any stage. It is secreted as a soluble protein and binds cell-surface receptors via reversible non-covalent interaction while remaining in equilibrium with the soluble pool. No documented stable surface tethering, covalent anchoring, or non-baseline cell-state/tissue-restricted surface display. Fails the recruitment test: protein washes off and is not stably linked to the membrane.
